title: Krunkit binary missing from every installation package
body:
### Issue Description

The arm64 dmg, universal dmg, and even the brew installation result in 'Krunkit' binary not found. There doesn't seem to be any simple way to install podman / podman desktop

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Download **any** dmg installer for podman.
2. Go through onboarding to set up podman.
3. Observe `There is an problem finding 'krunkit' binary. Try to install it manualy, or install Podman from installer.` error message.


### Describe the results you received

Describe the results you received

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
I also encountered this problem and solved it after manually installing it.
https://github.com/containers/krunkit
Hi @jackofsometrade, how did you install podman? If you build from source and make sure you have commit d0be0e9659542b50637d6dde0dcc071c81c869f0 does this still occur?

> Hi [@jackofsometrade](https://github.com/jackofsometrade), how did you install podman? If you build from source and make sure you have commit [d0be0e9](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/d0be0e9659542b50637d6dde0dcc071c81c869f0) does this still occur?

I encountered the same problem installing via `brew install --cask podman-desktop` on MacOS ARM . 
I resolved by installing manually krunkit like suggested by @tianjinbaoo

We recommend using our pkg installers instead https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.6.1which definitely bundle krunkit.

We have no control over what brew ships.
I have this problem now as well - first installed podman desktop from brew - then saw this so I uninstalled that and installed from the native .dmg - same result...  I'll try the above for krunkit
I had the same problem, installed the podman and podman-desktop from GitHub, with the same effect

I also had this problem after installing with Homebrew, and was able to fix it by running the following:

```sh
brew tap slp/krunkit
brew install krunkit
```

> We recommend using our pkg installers instead https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.6.1which definitely bundle krunkit.

Looks like your package installers do not install krunkit, though. Just tried reinstalling it from the package (tried universal and arm64) in your recent release and after starting podman desktop, during the first configuration (where you setup your podman machine) `krunkit` can't be found.

Edit: Sorry, actually the binary is installed, just seems like Podman can't find it?
